inputs.label: Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Target volumetric flow rate of the fluid to be filtered.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target volumetric flow rate of the fluid to be filtered.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit volumétrique cible du fluide à filtrer
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal volumétrico objetivo del fluido a filtrar

inputs.label: Pressure Drop
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable pressure drop across the filter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum allowable pressure drop across the filter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Filtre boyunca izin verilen maksimum basınç düşüşü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal zulässiger Druckverlust über dem Filter
businessContext_i18n.fr: Perte de charge maximale admissible à travers le filtre
businessContext_i18n.es: Caída de presión máxima permitida a través del filtro

inputs.label: Membrane Resistance
inputs.businessContext: Resistance of the clean filter medium.

businessContext_i18n.en: Resistance of the clean filter medium.

inputs.label: Cake Resistance
inputs.businessContext: Additional resistance from the filter cake (0 for clean filter).

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional resistance from the filter cake (0 for clean filter).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Filtre kekinden kaynaklanan ek direnç (temiz filtre için 0).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Widerstand durch den Filterkuchen (0 für sauberen Filter).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistance supplémentaire due au gâteau de filtration (0 pour un filtre propre)
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistencia adicional de la torta de filtración (0 para filtro limpio)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
